figures.caption: Table 3: Main result: DoRA + DPO 3-seed pool vs OpenVLA SFT on LIBERO 4-suite (600 trials total).
Figure 4: Qualitative k-NN retrieval examples: 6 query frames × top-3 retrieved neighbours. Ticks indicate same-task hits.
Figure 1: LIBERO 4-suite: SFT, LoRA single-seed, LoRA multiseed pool (where available), DoRA 3-seed pool. DoRA improves over SFT on all four suites with a mean +10.4 pp gain across 600 trials.

Figure 3: Multi-view + temporal contrastive training on real LIBERO RLDS with frozen SigLIPso400m. Total InfoNCE loss 2.42 → 0.37 (92.5% recovery from logB = 4.85 random baseline) in 470 steps; Lmva > Ltc throughout (cross-view harder than nearby-temporal).
Figure 2: Left: π0.5 sample_actions latency breakdown. Right: cache strategy benchmark on LIBERO Spatial × 50 trials.
